title: Desktop App Versions

posts.author: mattbr (Matt)
posts.cookedHtml:
I wonder if anyone else has experienced this…
I recently installed the desktop app for Monday on a colleagues new Mac Book.
On opening the app the layout was very different to what we expected. The left-hand column had more content/options (subtly different layout), sub-items were to the right of the item, where you find ‘normal’ content columns etc.

The other apps installed on the other Macs in the office all had the same layout which was almost identical to the web browser view.

The version we are using is V1.0.39, recently updated via the App Store, my colleagues version is 5.25.2 (or similar)!

Odd.
